string 2:
"I saw a weird dinosaur in Shinjuku," huh? Sounds a bit
outlandish...
That outfit... Are you coming from some kind of event?

What a hassle. For some reason, the trains are all stopped
and there are no taxis.
We're trying to find another way to get home, but...

What does that matter? Just hurry up and find us
a way home already!

What's going on? These clouds came out of nowhere, and my
cell reception is awful.

All the cars have disappeared, too. Did something serious
happen?

Guess there's a protest going on at the Wall of Hope. And
the transit systems are all down, too... What's going on?

You gotta be kiddin' me! The trains aren't runnin'? And,
seriously, what's with all these blockades?

No one's allowed through right now! We're inquiring about
the reason, ourselves...

I'm sorry, but you can't go this way right now... because...
Well, we're getting a mixed bag of information...

Sorry, but the station's currently off-limits. We've been
told that public safety is in the middle of an operation.

The station is closed right now. All subway lines in Tokyo
have been stopped due to an expected large tremor.

You can't go past this point... Ugh! Why do we have to do
this for a so-called "operation" of another organization?

This street is closed, so please go some other way. We don't
know the details, either. It's a request from public safety.

Going after that light that fell on the government building
takes priority right now.
Let's avoid drawing attention and hurry to the Misono household.

Dang it! I've got something important to take care of!
They're still not moving yet?!

That anime reminds me of one I used to love back in the
day. What was it called again...?

That's why I need you to see what I've done. I've worked
really hard these past eight years.

It's supposed to air tomorrow. So... I don't want you
disappearing again until it does.

No matter what happens or where you go... just make sure
you come back here tomorrow. Okay?
Oh, you play cards, too? How about a match?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Care for a card game? I'm pretty good, you know. You think
you can handle me?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
I see. Maybe another time, then.

A total defeat... You're amazing! I'll have to rethink my
deck from scratch!
Hehe. Too bad! Feel free to challenge me again any time.
Looks like it's my loss. Well played!
I win! I was feeling pretty confident in my deck today!
Oh, well. Let me know if you ever change your mind.
Agent Alpha is a good anime. Did you know it's a remake?

The older version has a lot of core fans in the animation
industry, too.

And so they finally remade it! The staff that was involved
in it must've been so happy.

There used to be a movie theater in the Nishi-Shinjuku area, 
but it was destroyed in the commotion eleven years ago.

The animation director who was speaking
at the preview that day passed away there.

I heard he became an animation director
because he saw Agent Alpha.

If it weren't for that incident, he might've
been the one remaking Agent Alpha.

Localized tremors, outbursts of fickle weather, and now strange
creatures... What the hell is happening in Shinjuku?

The trains aren't running? There aren't any taxis, either,
so I guess I'm stuck...

There's gotta be some conspiracy behind the Wall of Hope!
Let's go join the protest and find out what's up!

*sigh* What a pain... Things seem like they're gonna
get bad here, so I'd rather just get home fast.

No way... This road's closed, too? How am I supposed to get
to the movie theater now...?
This road is currently off-limits to all foot traffic!

Yeah, that's right. You can't use the station right now. We are
expecting a big tremor in a moment, so please take caution.

Going to Kabukicho? Well, I can't let you through right now
because... it's part of an operation. That's all I can say.
Let's focus on the investigation for now.

The blockade is because of that incident before... Sorry
for the trouble.

We're temporarily closing off Shinjuku with an electromagnetic
net. You folks need to evacuate at once!

This area will soon be off-limits! Please follow orders as
instructed!

I'm not sure what you mean by, "I can't evacuate right 
now," but...
These stupid blockades are ruining all my plans! I hate my life!

Probably safe to assume work is canceled in a situation as
strange as this. I'm grateful for the time off, but...

...it doesn't look like I have a way to get home. What am I
supposed to do now?

It looks like we can go this way, but the police are talking
about some sort of "operation" and it's freaking me out...

Going after that light that fell on the government building
takes priority right now.
The area up ahead has been overrun by Digimon. Stay on your toes!

There are dangerous Digimon beyond this point.
Please stay back!

Digimon haven't gotten into the underground yet, so please
use that for evacuation and transportation.
There are so many Digimon... Where did they all come from?

It's too dangerous outside, so you need to evacuate
underground!

Civilians?! Didn't you hear the evacuation order?! And is
that thing behind you a Digimon?!

Dr. Simmons instructed me to report back to her when an
agent with a Digimon showed up.

The doctor isn't here right now... but it's not safe outside
the barrier. You should come inside for now.

This area is currently off-limits. Civilians are to
evacuate underground.

The time has come to put our training to the test! This is
a critical situation, so stay focused!
Yes, sir!

You're the kids from a while ago! Kuroi and Shiroki have
been worried about you, you know.

We've been briefed. It's the back alley up ahead!
Good luck!

The way ahead is blocked, so please turn back. Please be
aware that a huge tremor is expected.
No one's allowed this way. Turn around.

You can't go this way... It's almost time for that thing to
start moving...
Is something happenin' up front? I can't see a thing.
Go up there and check for me!

Welp, I guess there's no seein' anything with this crowd.
I just really wanna know what's goin' on!
What is that? It looks like a rip in the sky...!

This way seems to lead to some back streets... I'd better
focus on the investigation for now.
Hey, are you one of them? A Digimon?
Are you really a Digimon? Hey!
Huh? What gives? Are you ignoring me?
Hey! Look at me! H-E-L-L-O!
Let's go, Aegiomon!

Now my channel will have an explosion of subscribers...!
I'm going to surpass OcculTokyo TV's two million subscribers!
I ain't some suspicious person! I had business here, that's all!

Look. Dressed like that... You're going to have to come
with me to the station.
But I ain't done nothin' wrong! Leave me alone!
You... I know you. You've done well to come.
The arena is down below. Go and train yourself, warrior...

THIS IS THE THEATER WHERE A MIGHTY DIGIMON ONCE BATTLED A
COURAGEOUS WARRIOR.

THERE WAS SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE, BUT AFTER AN INTENSE
STRUGGLE, THE WARRIOR EMERGED VICTORIOUS.

THE EVENT WAS A SHOCKING MOMENT OF CONTACT BETWEEN HUMANS
AND DIGIMON.

YET IT ALSO BECAME ONE OF THE STEPPING STONES TOWARD
COEXISTENCE.

WE WISH TO CHERISH AND PRESERVE THE RELATIONSHIP THAT THE
WARRIOR ESTABLISHED.

A live commentary from Andromon right here at the famous
theater square?! This is amazing! I've gotta take a picture!
Hm? Oh, my! Oh, my! It's you! You're safe!

I ran desperately away from the Titans
and somehow ended up here.

Everyone seemed so frightened, so I decided to stay put.
Now I've turned into a bit of a tourist attraction.

Sorry, but I can't leave now.
Please let everyone know I'm all right.

Still, this town is quite fascinating.
So many different humans to see every day.

Although... sometimes they take their frustrations
out on me. It can be a bit tough... Haha...
This is the Shinjuku Underground Arena!

If you need to return to Rebellion Village, just let me
know! I'll be on the rooftop back at the house.

What? You want to have a card battle with me? Well, my
boyfriend isn't here yet, so I guess I can play with you!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

No? Hmph! ...Well, it's fine, I guess. But, seriously,
how long is he going to keep me waiting?!

All right! I win! I bet you thought I'd be bad
at this game, huh?! Well, too bad for you!

Aw, I lost. I'll have to ask my boyfriend for
some pointers when he gets here!

Damn it. Some of the Digimon we forced into the district
have escaped.

It's rumored that a certain Digimon group has been raiding
to rescue their locked-up allies.

Luckily, it was the area that kept the milder Digimon. No
significant damage has been done yet.

Digimon are rapidly beginning to invade the city. This is an 
emergency. We at D-SAT need to hurry and recapture them!

Phew. Thank goodness the Digimon that escaped from the
district were relatively milder than the others.

Just the thought of a herd of huge and violent Digimon
being unleashed onto the city is horrifying.
Shinjuku could've been a pile of rubble by now.

We're telling people to stay away from Digimon, but they
won't listen!

This must be because of all those Digimon videos on the
net. There are so many, probably because they get the views.

So people have become used to seeing them. They don't get 
that it's just a fluke that they're not attacking.
Keep your distance from the Digimon!
You never know what these things are going to do.
Stay back if you don't want to get hurt!
It's dangerous past this point. Please stay back.

Hey! You, there! I see you've got some cards!
How about a match? I'll make it worth your while!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Tch, you're no fun. Guess I'm just wastin'
my breath on you.

No way... I wasn't expectin' to lose.
I was hoping for a win to make myself feel better.

Yes! I win! Looks like you need to
rethink your strategy!
Shall I lead you to the site?
Yes, please.
{end}Not right now.
What's that? A request from Dr. Simmons?
Very well. Come in.

Eyewitness reports mentioned a sighting
at the end of the platform!

This must be the spot.
Let's get to investigating!
Hello there! It's 〇〇〇!
EEEEEEEK! A monster! *faints*
Uh, Hiroko?! Jeez, she's always like this...
I've had word from Dr. Simmons. You can go on through.
This is Kuroi...

Hey, did you hear? They're considering sealing off that
underground space.

The higher-ups are getting cold feet. They've told us not
to do anything rash for the moment.

All they do is hold meeting after meeting, never really
deciding on anything.
We're on patrol duty until further notice.
Keep a close watch around Shinjuku Park, all right?

We're closed today since we didn't get our food delivery.
Seems there was some accident...
Welcome! Make yourself at home.

Yeesh, there are way more people here than I expected.
Doesn't look like we'll be gettin' any further, huh?

You're obviously hiding something! Stop making excuses and
just tell us!

We know this place is the cause of all the paranormal
phenomena! Just admit it and start doing something!

Calm down, folks! This, too, is caused by whatever's behind
the Wall! We have to do something before it gets worse!

Wh-Whoa! What was that tremor just now?! Is there something
here?! What's happening?!
This area is off-limits. Please turn back.

Is everything all right?! This is BAD... Don't tell me
they're getting even more active now?!

Hm? Are you part of the protest, too? Don't hold back!
Get up there and make yourself heard!

There are tons of videos of weird occurrences in
Nishi-Shinjuku posted on the Net these days...

And I don't mean your ordinary scary stories, here...
I'm talkin' actual explosions, bursts of flame...

...and huge shadows walkin' the streets at night! The videos
always get taken down fast, so that means they must be real!

Not gonna lie. I seriously believe all of it!
Especially since there's a cover-up goin' on...

It all means something fishy is goin' on in Nishi-Shinjuku!
There has to be! I just know it!

Your coordinates have been received without any problem.
Please proceed to the next point.

Strange phenomena? Hmm, yeah. I do hear that
phrase a lot lately...

But there's always been stuff like this happening, right?
Even if it does seem a little too frequent lately!

If we're talking weird goings-on, have you heard about
the strange door in a back alley of Kabukicho?

They say it suddenly appears where there was
no door before and sucks people in!

Freaky, huh? Except... I also kind of want to see it, you know?
I don't know the exact location, but I'm sooo curious!

Calibration is progressing nicely. Please proceed
to the final point.

What's the point of protesting in front of that wall...?
Nothing in the world ever changes anyway, right?

I wanna get on the train, but everything's shut down. And what
the heck do the police mean by "prepare for a big tremor"?

That unmanned crane keeps shaking from time to time.
Something must be goin' on over there, right?

I wanna join the protest, but goin' by myself's a little
awkward... There's gotta be a way around that...

All right, people, the road is closed off up ahead.
Be sure not to touch any of the emergency vehicles.

Man, I've been standing here all day... I wonder when that 
thing is gonna start moving. Hey, this place is off-limits!
You can't enter the station right now. Sorry about that.

This device creates powerful electromagnetic waves that
interfere with phase electrons, immobilizing the Digimon.

Hee hee! But, I must say, I never thought to see
the fruits of my research put to the test so soon!

The only issue is... electric power. We're having some
issues in that area, due to overly rushed preparations.
The public safety people appear to be rather frazzled...

M-My sincerest apologies! I'm afraid I don't have time to
talk right now!

The cause of the roadblock is unknown. Internet rumors say 
it's the effect of a public safety operation, but who knows?

The protest site's just up ahead! Time to go expose them
for the con artists they are!

The Wall of Hope is the only place we can get to?! What's
goin' on?!

Why are the police and public safety being so secretive?!
That kind of attitude is what's causing this protest!

It's no use getting upset. I spoke to the security guy and he
said to watch out for a big tremor. What does that mean?

I'm kind of at a loss, though... How are we supposed to get
home?

I don't have a clue what's going on, but at least classes
are canceled! Talk about lucky!
Still, what's the point if we can't actually go anywhere?

Totally... With no trains running, what are we even
supposed to do?

Hey, how about checking out that new sweets shop that
opened nearby?
Wait. Are they really open at a time like this?!

I can't believe you actually wanna go with all this sketchy
stuff going on...

What's that? A weird light, you say? What are you talking
about? The only thing weird is that getup of yours...

*panting*... S-Some weird monster and a kid in a T-shirt came
up out of a manhole...!
Over there, right? Let's go check it out!

I swear! You're just as stubborn as he is. I see that
trying to stop you isn't going to work.

Just promise that you'll get yourselves out of there if
things get too dangerous.

If anything ever happened to you... I'd never be able to
look your father in the eye again!
Whew... Things have finally settled down...
I say we head right home.

We've lost contact with the public safety officers who went
to the underground device.
Please start with checking on that device.
Still, I hate having to rely on the help of civilians again...
What's the status on that generator?!

It won't start, sir. Regular batteries don't seem to be
sufficient to power it.

So much for the blockade... Gah! We can't just let those
monsters out into the world!
Is everything all right?!

Wh-What the...? You folks need to leave this area
immediately!

Dr. Simmons sent us. We're here to help activate the
generators.
But you're civilians! Has she lost her mind?!
Incoming message from Dr. Simmons!

She says she gave the batteries to these kids here, so get
one from them.

She also says that they'll take care of activating the
remaining generators, so point them in the right direction.
Here's the battery.
Where should we head next?

Orders from the doctor or no, I can't send you children
into danger.

If anything ever happened to you... I'd never be able to
look your father in the eye again!

I was there when he gave up his public safety badge, you
know. I saw firsthand what he was going through...
Your old man was a colleague of mine, you see.
You worked with my dad...?
That's right. The name's Kuremi.
I have a daughter around your age, myself.

Pretty much every father in the world would say their
children matter more to them than their own life.

Hey, I've got tons of stories about your dad... but this is
no time for reminiscing. Your safety takes priority.
Right now, you folks need to clear out of here, and fast!

Making my father sad is the last thing I want to do. But if
you won't tell us, we'll have to go search on our own!

I swear! You're just as stubborn as he is. Fine...
Extenuating circumstances, and all that.
Give them the locations.
Guess I have no choice... Okay, listen up.

There are two more electromagnetic net generators
that aren't working.

The power won't be stable and the generators just won't work 
properly unless they're all up and running at the same time.
Which one should we start with?

I'm sending you the coordinates now. Head to the Shinjuku
underground first.

To tell the truth, some of our people went down there a
little while ago...
...but we haven't been able to get in contact with them since.

Wow, I hope they're all right... Okay, we'll head to the
underground right away.
Hey, you've got some cards! How about a match?!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
I guess you do seem kinda busy. Maybe next time, then.

All right! I won! I knew that combo would
do the trick!

Darn... I was sure this deck would be a
good one...
Let's head to Akihabara, then!
Do you want to enter the bouts?
{next}[Enter.]
{end}[Don't enter.]

Sorry, but there aren't any available bouts right now.
Come back another time.

Got cold feet, huh? Don't worry.
There's no shame in that.

You've been entered as a competitor.
Head to the waiting room!

Looks like we're in for another exciting battle!
I've got to hurry so I can grab a good seat!

Whew...! I was feeling down and out,
but I'm finally getting my edge back!
Those Titans! They're going to pay for what they've done!
Hey! How's it goin'? Everythin' good?!

Yeah, it's pretty lively so sales are solid. Though, I'll
need to start scouting for the next contenders soon.

Excellent! Datamon's colosseum is a hit!
We're rollin' in profits! Hohoho!

We welcome anyone who wishes to fight in the
Shinjuku Underground Arena.

It's a way for us to find strong Digimon to prepare
for the fight against the Titans.
Hmm? Little Bearmon?

Oh, you must mean GrapLeomon, a top ranker
at this coliseum.

If you've got something to say to GrapLeomon, you should
talk with your fists. Prove you're worth his time.

That's the rule in these here parts. No complaining if you
participate. There's no guarantee you'll make it out alive.
Do you want to enter the bouts?

All right! We've got you entered.
Now, go to the waiting room.

The second bout will begin shortly.
Head to the waiting room.

Great match! Once you're ready for the third bout,
head to the waiting room!
I knew you'd make it this far!

Now it's time to challenge the champion!
Get out there and give us the best match ever!

That was an intense match!
You're the ultimate champion!

The second bout will begin shortly! Competitors,
please proceed to the waiting room!

The third bout will begin shortly! Competitors,
please proceed to the waiting room!

The fourth bout will begin shortly! Competitors,
please proceed to the waiting room!

The title match for the SDGP championship will begin shortly! 
Competitors, please proceed to the waiting room!

The competitors' waiting room is up ahead.
Come back after you've registered.

Are you prepared for the match?
Enter once you're ready.

Ah, our new champion. We're looking forward to
more exciting matches from you.

I'm Okamoto from Weekly Digimon Battle Magazine!
Your match was truly spectacular!

As the new champion, will you be aiming for the
Paradise Colosseum Great Titan Cup next?!
What's that? You're tired and want to talk later?
